ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cruise_ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cruise ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the cruise ship */,
  "total_cabins" INTEGER /* Total number of cabins on the ship */,
  "max_guests" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the ship can accommodate */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the ship was launched */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the ship */,
  "ship_length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "ship_width" REAL /* Width of the ship in meters */,
  "ship_tonnage" INTEGER /* Gross tonnage of the ship */,
  "cruise_line" TEXT /* Name of the cruise line to which the ship belongs */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the ship's official website */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the ship */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average guest rating of the ship */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the cabin category (e.g., Main Deck Triple) */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck number where the cabin category is located */,
  "cabin_size" REAL /* Size of the cabin in square meters */,
  "bed_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the beds (e.g., two single beds, king bed) */,
  "window_type" TEXT /* Type of window (e.g., porthole, panoramic) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the cabin */,
  "max_guests" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the cabin can accommodate */,
  "min_guests" INTEGER /* Minimum number of guests the cabin can accommodate */,
  "bathroom_size" REAL /* Size of the bathroom in square meters */,
  "bathroom_features" TEXT /* Features of the bathroom (e.g., bathtub, shower) */,
  "balcony_size" REAL /* Size of the balcony in square meters (if applicable) */,
  "balcony_features" TEXT /* Features of the balcony (e.g., seating, dining area) */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view from the cabin (e.g., ocean view, city view) */,
  "additional_fees" REAL /* Any additional fees for the cabin (e.g., service fees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_categories_deck FOREIGN KEY ("deck") REFERENCES cruise_ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin category */,
  "price_per_person" REAL /* Price per person for the cabin category */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the price validity period */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the price validity period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for early booking or special promotions */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for early booking or special promotions */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night for the cabin */,
  "price_per_cruise" REAL /* Price for the entire cruise duration */,
  "dynamic_pricing_factor" REAL /* Factor used to adjust prices dynamically (e.g., based on demand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_prices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cabin_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cruise ship */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin category */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Number of the cabin */,
  "deck_number" TEXT /* Deck number of the cabin */,
  "cabin_location" TEXT /* Location of the cabin on the deck */,
  "cabin_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the cabin (e.g., floor plan) */,
  "cabin_view" TEXT /* Type of view from the cabin (e.g., ocean view, city view) */,
  "cabin_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the cabin (e.g., mini-bar, safe) */,
  "cabin_accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility features (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  "cabin_rating" REAL /* Average guest rating of the cabin */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES cruise_ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cabin_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the availability is recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., Available, Booked) */,
  "booked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who booked the cabin */,
  "booked_by_agent" INTEGER /* ID of the travel agent who booked the cabin */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* More detailed status (e.g., Tentative, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_booked_by FOREIGN KEY ("booked_by") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_booked_by_agent FOREIGN KEY ("booked_by_agent") REFERENCES travel_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the guest */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the guest */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the guest */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the guest */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the guest */,
  "passport_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the passport */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the guest */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Whether the guest is a member of the cruise line's loyalty program */,
  "member_number" TEXT /* Loyalty program member number */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Points balance in the loyalty program */,
  "total_cruises_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of cruises the guest has taken with the cruise line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest making the booking */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booked cabin */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "total_guests" INTEGER /* Total number of guests in the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "booking_source" TEXT /* Source of the booking (e.g., online, travel agent) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made by the guest */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* More detailed status (e.g., Tentative, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was cancelled (if applicable) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference or request */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., room service, tour booking) */,
  "preference_details" TEXT /* Details of the preference or request */,
  "preference_status" TEXT /* Status of the preference (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "preference_cost" REAL /* Additional cost for the preference (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_preferences_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the travel agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the travel agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel agency */,
  "agency_location" TEXT /* Location of the travel agency */,
  "agent_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the travel agent */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the travel agent */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings made by the travel agent */,
  "commission_earned" REAL /* Total commission earned by the travel agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_bookings" (
  "agent_booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent booking */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel agent */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Commission amount for the agent */,
  "booking_source" TEXT /* Source of the booking (e.g., online, travel agent) */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* More detailed status (e.g., Tentative, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_bookings_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_bookings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES travel_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruise_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Captain, Cabin Manager) */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cruise ship */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "position_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the staff member's position */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the staff member */,
  "training_certifications" TEXT /* Training certifications held by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cruise_staff_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES cruise_ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruise_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity or event */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cruise ship */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity or event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity or event */,
  "date_and_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity or event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity or event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity for the activity or event */,
  "booked_slots" INTEGER /* Number of booked slots for the activity or event */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., entertainment, dining, excursion) */,
  "activity_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the activity */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the activity */,
  "activity_cost" REAL /* Cost of the activity */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* More detailed status (e.g., Available, Booked, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cruise_activities_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES cruise_ships ("ship_id")
)
